activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that correctly use a finished past time.
activities.prompt: Identify the sentences whose actions belong to a completed past period.

options.text: We signed the contract yesterday.
I sent the invoice two hours ago.
We have signed the contract yesterday.
I have sent the invoice two hours ago.

activities.explanation: «Yesterday» y «ago» cierran el marco temporal y exigen past simple.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that correctly describe experience up to now.
activities.prompt: Identify the two grammatically correct statements about lifetime experience.

options.text: I've never travelled by sleeper train.
Have you ever tried kayaking?
I never have travelled yesterday.
Did you ever tried kayaking?

activities.explanation: Las experiencias sin fecha terminada usan present perfect con «never» o «ever».

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that correctly describe progress up to now.
activities.prompt: Choose the two valid totals measured from the past up to the present.

options.text: We've received eight applications so far.
The class has completed three units this term.
We received eight applications so far tomorrow.
The class have complete three units this term.

activities.explanation: «So far» y el trimestre aún abierto conectan los recuentos con el presente.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that correctly use past simple.
activities.prompt: Which sentences contain a clear finished date?

options.text: Nora visited the gallery last Saturday.
The shop opened in 2016.
Nora has visited the gallery last Saturday.
The shop has opened in 2016.

activities.explanation: «Last Saturday» e «in 2016» son referencias pasadas cerradas.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that follow the dataset's British English pattern.
activities.prompt: Which sentences correctly describe recent or pending actions?

options.text: The train has just arrived.
We haven't printed the tickets yet.
The train has just arrive.
We didn't printed the tickets yet.

activities.explanation: El patrón editorial combina present perfect con «just» y «yet».

activities.instructions: Select the two lines that correctly move from experience to past details.
activities.prompt: A speaker says: “I've been to Vienna.” Which follow-up lines are correct?

options.text: When did you go?
Who did you travel with?
When have you gone?
Who have you travelled with in 2022?

activities.explanation: Una vez presentada la experiencia, las preguntas por detalles usan past simple.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences whose past action has a relevant result now.
activities.prompt: Which sentences correctly use present perfect?

options.text: I've lost my access card, so I can't enter.
The lift has broken down, so we must use the stairs.
I've lost my card yesterday, but found it.
The lift has broken down at 8.05 yesterday.

activities.explanation: Las dos formas correctas explican consecuencias vigentes sin una fecha terminada.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that match the stated time of day.
activities.prompt: It is 11 a.m. Which sentences correctly treat this morning as unfinished?

options.text: I've answered seven emails this morning.
We've had two deliveries this morning.
I answered seven emails tomorrow morning.
We have had two deliveries last night.

activities.explanation: A las once, «this morning» sigue siendo un periodo abierto.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences with the correct time frame.
activities.prompt: It is Thursday of the current week.

options.text: We've held three interviews this week.
We held three interviews last week.
We've held three interviews last week.
We have hold three interviews this week.

activities.explanation: La semana actual está abierta; la semana pasada está cerrada.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that correctly match their time marker.
activities.prompt: Compare a recent open period with a change completed in January.

options.text: The service has improved considerably in recent months.
The service improved after the update in January.
The service has improved in January 2022.
The service improve in recent months.

activities.explanation: «Recent months» mantiene un periodo abierto; enero fecha un cambio terminado.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that match the person's current location.
activities.prompt: Rina is away at the bank; Owen visited the bank and returned.

options.text: Rina has gone to the bank.
Owen has been to the bank.
Rina has been to the bank and is still there.
Owen has gone to the bank and is back here.

activities.explanation: «Gone» implica ausencia actual; «been» implica visita y regreso.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that correctly reflect whether a lifetime is open or closed.
activities.prompt: Ada died in 1968. Luis is alive and continues publishing.

options.text: Ada wrote four textbooks.
Luis has published four textbooks so far.
Ada has written four textbooks so far.
Luis published four textbooks so far in his still-open career.

activities.explanation: La vida de Ada es un periodo cerrado; la producción de Luis puede continuar.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that correctly present news and its dated detail.
activities.prompt: Which pair of individual sentences could appear in the same report?

options.text: The council has approved the transport plan.
Councillors voted for it on Tuesday.
The council has approved it on Tuesday.
Councillors have voted for it last Tuesday.

activities.explanation: Present perfect introduce la noticia; past simple aporta el detalle fechado.

activities.instructions: Select the two correct questions about experience up to now.
activities.prompt: No specific past date is being requested.

options.text: Have you ever led a large team?
Has Mina ever spoken on the radio?
Did you ever led a large team?
Has Mina ever spoke on the radio?

activities.explanation: Las preguntas neutrales de experiencia usan «have/has + ever + participio».

activities.instructions: Select the two correct questions about specific past details.
activities.prompt: The speaker has already confirmed that the events happened.

options.text: Where did you give the talk?
Who did Mina interview?
Where have you gave the talk?
Who has Mina interviewed last Monday?

activities.explanation: Los detalles concretos de eventos ya identificados usan «did + infinitivo».

activities.instructions: Select the two clauses that correctly match their markers.
activities.prompt: Neither supplier has completed every step.

options.text: Neither supplier has made a firm offer so far.
One supplier sent an estimate yesterday.
Neither supplier have made an offer so far.
One supplier has sent an estimate yesterday.

activities.explanation: «So far» usa present perfect; «yesterday» usa past simple.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that correctly describe first experiences.
activities.prompt: Choose the two valid descriptions of something happening for the first time.

options.text: This is the first time I have chaired a meeting.
It is the first time either of us has travelled alone.
This is the first time I chaired ever a meeting.
It is the first time either of us have travel alone.

activities.explanation: «The first time» se combina con present perfect; «either» lleva «has».

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that match the stated perspective.
activities.prompt: It is 3 p.m.; the speaker treats the morning as finished but the current week as open.

options.text: I had three calls this morning.
I've had nine calls this week.
I've had three calls this morning at 3 p.m.
I had nine calls so far this week.

activities.explanation: La mañana se ha cerrado; la semana actual continúa.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that correctly contrast a current result and a dated event.
activities.prompt: Distinguish the server's current failure from the exact time when it stopped.

options.text: The server has stopped responding, so the site is offline.
The server stopped responding at 14.07.
The server has stopped responding at 14.07 yesterday.
The server stopped responding, so it has been offline yesterday.

activities.explanation: El resultado actual admite present perfect; una hora concreta pide past simple.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that correctly contrast recent development and a dated change.
activities.prompt: Distinguish an ongoing rise in demand from the total recorded in 2024.

options.text: Demand has risen sharply in recent months.
Demand rose by 12% in 2024.
Demand has risen by 12% in 2024, a finished year.
Demand did rose in recent months so far.

activities.explanation: El periodo reciente abierto usa present perfect; el año terminado usa past simple.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that correctly report a fault and its repair.
activities.prompt: The machine is working now. It failed yesterday and was repaired today.

options.text: The machine broke down yesterday.
The technician has repaired it, so it is working again.
The machine has broken down yesterday.
The technician repaired it so far, so it is working.

activities.explanation: El fallo fechado usa past simple; la reparación se presenta mediante su resultado actual.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that correctly distinguish publication news from launch details.
activities.prompt: A company is announcing a new product and then describing its launch.

options.text: The company has released a new accessibility tool.
It launched the tool at a conference on Tuesday.
The company has released the tool on Tuesday.
It has launched the tool at last Tuesday's conference.

activities.explanation: La noticia sin fecha usa present perfect; el lanzamiento fechado usa past simple.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that correctly use an open and a closed total.
activities.prompt: The current month is not over; the previous month is finished.

options.text: We've processed 430 claims this month.
We processed 612 claims last month.
We have process 430 claims so far this month.
We've processed 612 claims last month.

activities.explanation: El mes actual abierto usa present perfect; el mes pasado usa past simple.

activities.instructions: Select the two lines that form a coherent experience-and-detail exchange.
activities.prompt: Choose one experience question and one correctly dated answer.

options.text: Have you ever worked with a sign-language interpreter?
Yes, I worked with one at a conference in 2023.
Did you ever worked with a sign-language interpreter?
Yes, I have worked with one at a conference in 2023.

activities.explanation: La pregunta de experiencia usa present perfect; la respuesta fechada usa past simple.

activities.instructions: Select the two sentences that correctly reflect their temporal viewpoint.
activities.prompt: A report first states the current situation, then identifies a completed inspection.

options.text: Inspectors have found a serious fault in the roof.
They discovered it during Monday's inspection.
Inspectors have found it during Monday's inspection.
They have discovered it last Monday.

activities.explanation: El hallazgo se presenta como noticia actual; el detalle de la inspección terminada usa past simple.
